name: Patty Ann's Mincemeat Bars
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Patty Ann Spalding Preparation Time: 0:25
FOR CRUST: Grease a 7 x 11 x 2 inch pan. Combine the crust ingredients and mix well. Press half of the mixture into the pan. Spread with mincemeat filling.
FOR FILLING: Simmer all ingredients until thick. Cool. Spread over dough in the pan, and cover with remaining dough. Pat down well.
Bake at 350°F for 25-35 minutes. Cool in pan. Cut into squares.
Store in tin box between layers of wax paper.
